name: Local Account Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of local user accounts
query:
// Detect local account enumeration
// Trigger on net user, Get-LocalUser, or /etc/passwd enumeration
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(net\s+user\s*$|Get-LocalUser|wmic\s+useraccount|cut.*-d.*:.*-f.*\/etc\/passwd|dscl.*-list.*Users)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
